681	/-! ### Ambient subquotient induction for Stacks 00K1
682	
683	The Route-2 graded-module side of the inductive step. Everything is phrased over a
684	**fixed** ambient graded `κ`-module `M = ⨁ ℳ n`: a subquotient is a pair of homogeneous
685	submodules `N' ≤ N ⊆ M`, and its Hilbert function is the ambient dimension difference
686	`n ↦ dim_κ(N ⊓ ℳ n) − dim_κ(N' ⊓ ℳ n)`. The kernel and cokernel of a degree-one
687	endomorphism are again ambient subquotient pairs, so no `DirectSum.Decomposition` on a
688	quotient/subtype carrier is ever formed (cf.
689	`memory/graded-quotient-module-isdefeq-pathology.md`). -/
690	
691	section Subquotient
692	
693	variable {κ M : Type*} [Field κ] [AddCommGroup M] [Module κ M]
694	variable (ℳ : ℕ → Submodule κ M) [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ]
695	
696	/-- A `κ`-linear endomorphism `x` of `M` **raises degree by one** with respect to the
697	grading `ℳ` when `x (ℳ n) ⊆ ℳ (n+1)` for every `n`. This is the abstract, graded-ring-free
698	form of "multiplication by a degree-one element" used in the Stacks 00K1 induction.
699	Project-local. -/
700	def RaisesDegree (x : M →ₗ[κ] M) : Prop := ∀ n, (ℳ n).map x ≤ ℳ (n + 1)
701	
702	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
703	/-- Membership form of `RaisesDegree`. -/
704	lemma RaisesDegree.mem {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x) {n : ℕ} {m : M}
705	    (hm : m ∈ ℳ n) : x m ∈ ℳ (n + 1) :=
706	  hx n (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem hm)
707	
708	/-- The **ambient subquotient Hilbert function** of a pair of homogeneous submodules
709	`N' ≤ N ⊆ M`: `n ↦ dim_κ(N ⊓ ℳ n) − dim_κ(N' ⊓ ℳ n)` (computed in `ℤ`, cast to `ℚ`).
710	This is the data the Stacks 00K1 induction tracks; it depends only on the ambient
711	intersections `N ⊓ ℳ n`, `N' ⊓ ℳ n` of submodules of the fixed `M`. Project-local. -/
712	noncomputable def subquotientHilb (N N' : Submodule κ M) (n : ℕ) : ℚ :=
713	  (((Module.finrank κ ↥(N ⊓ ℳ n) : ℤ) - (Module.finrank κ ↥(N' ⊓ ℳ n) : ℤ) : ℤ) : ℚ)
714	
715	/-- A degree-raising endomorphism shifts the homogeneous decomposition: the degree-`(i+1)`
716	component of `x m` is `x` applied to the degree-`i` component of `m`. This is the ambient
717	commutation fact that makes preimages and images of homogeneous submodules under `x`
718	homogeneous. Project-local. -/
719	lemma decompose_raisesDegree {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x) (m : M) (i : ℕ) :
720	    (DirectSum.decompose ℳ (x m) (i + 1) : M) = x (DirectSum.decompose ℳ m i) := by
721	  classical
722	  conv_lhs => rw [← DirectSum.sum_support_decompose ℳ m, map_sum, DirectSum.decompose_sum]
723	  simp only [DirectSum.sum_apply, AddSubmonoidClass.coe_finset_sum]
724	  rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i]
725	  · exact DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_same ℳ
726	      (hx i (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem (SetLike.coe_mem _)))
727	  · intro j _ hji
728	    rw [DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_ne ℳ
729	      (hx j (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem (SetLike.coe_mem _))) (by omega : j + 1 ≠ i + 1)]
730	  · intro hi
731	    simp [DFinsupp.notMem_support_iff.mp hi]
732	
733	/-- The preimage of a homogeneous submodule under a degree-raising endomorphism is
734	homogeneous. Project-local. -/
735	lemma comap_isHomogeneous {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x)
736	    {N' : Submodule κ M} (hN' : N'.IsHomogeneous ℳ) :
737	    (N'.comap x).IsHomogeneous ℳ := by
738	  intro i z hz
739	  rw [Submodule.mem_comap, ← decompose_raisesDegree ℳ hx z i]
740	  exact (Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hN').mp (Submodule.mem_comap.mp hz) (i + 1)
741	
742	/-- A degree-raising endomorphism kills the degree-zero component: `x m` has no degree-`0`
743	part. Project-local. -/
744	lemma decompose_raisesDegree_zero {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x) (m : M) :
745	    (DirectSum.decompose ℳ (x m) 0 : M) = 0 := by
746	  classical
747	  conv_lhs => rw [← DirectSum.sum_support_decompose ℳ m, map_sum, DirectSum.decompose_sum]
748	  simp only [DirectSum.sum_apply, AddSubmonoidClass.coe_finset_sum]
749	  refine Finset.sum_eq_zero fun j _ => ?_
750	  rw [DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_ne ℳ
751	    (hx j (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem (SetLike.coe_mem _))) (by omega : j + 1 ≠ 0)]
752	
753	/-- The image of a homogeneous submodule under a degree-raising endomorphism is
754	homogeneous. Project-local. -/
755	lemma map_isHomogeneous {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x)
756	    {N : Submodule κ M} (hN : N.IsHomogeneous ℳ) :
757	    (N.map x).IsHomogeneous ℳ := by
758	  intro i z hz
759	  obtain ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩ := hz
760	  cases i with
761	  | zero => rw [decompose_raisesDegree_zero ℳ hx m]; exact Submodule.zero_mem _
762	  | succ i =>
763	      rw [decompose_raisesDegree ℳ hx m i]
764	      exact Submodule.mem_map_of_mem ((Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hN).mp hm i)
765	
766	/-- **Ambient image identity.** For a homogeneous submodule `N` and a degree-raising
767	endomorphism `x`, the degree-`(n+1)` part of `x · N` is `x · (N ⊓ ℳ n)`. Project-local. -/
768	lemma map_inf_degree_eq {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x)
769	    {N : Submodule κ M} (hN : N.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (n : ℕ) :
770	    N.map x ⊓ ℳ (n + 1) = (N ⊓ ℳ n).map x := by
771	  apply le_antisymm
772	  · rintro y ⟨hy1, hy2⟩
773	    obtain ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩ := hy1
774	    refine Submodule.mem_map.mpr ⟨DirectSum.decompose ℳ m n, ?_, ?_⟩
775	    · exact Submodule.mem_inf.mpr
776	        ⟨(Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hN).mp hm n, SetLike.coe_mem _⟩
777	    · rw [← decompose_raisesDegree ℳ hx m n]
778	      exact DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_same ℳ hy2
779	  · refine le_inf (Submodule.map_mono inf_le_left) ?_
780	    rw [Submodule.map_le_iff_le_comap]
781	    exact fun m hm => hx.mem ℳ (Submodule.mem_inf.mp hm).2
782	
783	/-- **Ambient distributive law.** Intersecting a sum of two homogeneous submodules with a
784	graded piece distributes: `(P + Q) ⊓ ℳ k = (P ⊓ ℳ k) + (Q ⊓ ℳ k)`. Project-local. -/
785	lemma sup_inf_degree_eq {P Q : Submodule κ M}
786	    (hP : P.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (hQ : Q.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (k : ℕ) :
787	    (P ⊔ Q) ⊓ ℳ k = (P ⊓ ℳ k) ⊔ (Q ⊓ ℳ k) := by
788	  apply le_antisymm
789	  · rintro z ⟨hzPQ, hzk⟩
790	    obtain ⟨p, hp, q, hq, rfl⟩ := Submodule.mem_sup.mp hzPQ
791	    have hpk : (DirectSum.decompose ℳ p k : M) ∈ P ⊓ ℳ k :=
792	      Submodule.mem_inf.mpr ⟨(Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hP).mp hp k, SetLike.coe_mem _⟩
793	    have hqk : (DirectSum.decompose ℳ q k : M) ∈ Q ⊓ ℳ k :=
794	      Submodule.mem_inf.mpr ⟨(Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hQ).mp hq k, SetLike.coe_mem _⟩
795	    have hsum : (DirectSum.decompose ℳ p k : M) + (DirectSum.decompose ℳ q k : M) = p + q := by
796	      have h := DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_same ℳ hzk
797	      rw [DirectSum.decompose_add, DirectSum.add_apply] at h
798	      simpa using h
799	    exact hsum ▸ Submodule.add_mem_sup hpk hqk
800	  · exact sup_le (le_inf (inf_le_left.trans le_sup_left) inf_le_right)
801	      (le_inf (inf_le_left.trans le_sup_right) inf_le_right)
802	
803	/-- The intersection of two homogeneous submodules is homogeneous. Project-local: Mathlib
804	provides no lattice-closure lemmas for `Submodule.IsHomogeneous`. -/
805	lemma inf_isHomogeneous {p q : Submodule κ M} (hp : p.IsHomogeneous ℳ)
806	    (hq : q.IsHomogeneous ℳ) : (p ⊓ q).IsHomogeneous ℳ := by
807	  intro i z hz
808	  exact Submodule.mem_inf.mpr
809	    ⟨(Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hp).mp (Submodule.mem_inf.mp hz).1 i,
810	      (Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hq).mp (Submodule.mem_inf.mp hz).2 i⟩
811	
812	/-- The sum (supremum) of two homogeneous submodules is homogeneous. Project-local. -/
813	lemma sup_isHomogeneous {p q : Submodule κ M} (hp : p.IsHomogeneous ℳ)
814	    (hq : q.IsHomogeneous ℳ) : (p ⊔ q).IsHomogeneous ℳ := by
815	  intro i z hz
816	  obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, rfl⟩ := Submodule.mem_sup.mp hz
817	  have hcoe : (DirectSum.decompose ℳ (a + b) i : M)
818	      = ↑(DirectSum.decompose ℳ a i) + ↑(DirectSum.decompose ℳ b i) := by
819	    rw [DirectSum.decompose_add, DirectSum.add_apply]; rfl
820	  rw [hcoe]
821	  exact Submodule.add_mem_sup ((Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hp).mp ha i)
822	    ((Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ hq).mp hb i)
823	
824	/-! #### Kernel/cokernel subquotient building blocks
825	
826	For a degree-raising endomorphism `x` and a homogeneous pair `N' ≤ N`, the kernel
827	subquotient is the pair `(N ⊓ x⁻¹N', N')` and the cokernel subquotient is the pair
828	`(N, N' + x·N)`. The lemmas here record that both new pairs are homogeneous, nest correctly,
829	are annihilated by `x`, and are preserved by any endomorphism `t` commuting with `x` that
830	preserves the original pair — the ambient (carrier-free) content of
831	`lem:graded_subquotient_ker_coker`. -/
832	
833	/-- The kernel subquotient's lower module `N ⊓ x⁻¹N'` is homogeneous. Project-local. -/
834	lemma ker_isHomogeneous {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x)
835	    {N N' : Submodule κ M} (hN : N.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (hN' : N'.IsHomogeneous ℳ) :
836	    (N ⊓ N'.comap x).IsHomogeneous ℳ :=
837	  inf_isHomogeneous ℳ hN (comap_isHomogeneous ℳ hx hN')
838	
839	/-- The cokernel subquotient's upper module `N' ⊔ x·N` is homogeneous. Project-local. -/
840	lemma coker_isHomogeneous {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x)
841	    {N N' : Submodule κ M} (hN : N.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (hN' : N'.IsHomogeneous ℳ) :
842	    (N' ⊔ N.map x).IsHomogeneous ℳ :=
843	  sup_isHomogeneous ℳ hN' (map_isHomogeneous ℳ hx hN)
844	
845	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
846	/-- The kernel subquotient nests: `N' ≤ N ⊓ x⁻¹N'`, using `N' ≤ N` and that `x` preserves
847	`N'`. Project-local. -/
848	lemma ker_le {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} {N N' : Submodule κ M} (hle : N' ≤ N)
849	    (hpresN' : N'.map x ≤ N') : N' ≤ N ⊓ N'.comap x :=
850	  le_inf hle (Submodule.map_le_iff_le_comap.mp hpresN')
851	
852	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
853	/-- The cokernel subquotient nests: `N' ⊔ x·N ≤ N`, using `N' ≤ N` and that `x` preserves
854	`N`. Project-local. -/
855	lemma coker_le {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} {N N' : Submodule κ M} (hle : N' ≤ N)
856	    (hpresN : N.map x ≤ N) : N' ⊔ N.map x ≤ N :=
857	  sup_le hle hpresN
858	
859	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
860	/-- `x` annihilates the kernel subquotient: `x·(N ⊓ x⁻¹N') ≤ N'`. Project-local. -/
861	lemma ker_annihilate {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} {N N' : Submodule κ M} :
862	    (N ⊓ N'.comap x).map x ≤ N' :=
863	  Submodule.map_le_iff_le_comap.mpr inf_le_right
864	
865	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
866	/-- `x` annihilates the cokernel subquotient: `x·N ≤ N' ⊔ x·N`. Project-local. -/
867	lemma coker_annihilate {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} {N N' : Submodule κ M} :
868	    N.map x ≤ N' ⊔ N.map x :=
869	  le_sup_right
870	
871	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
872	/-- An endomorphism `t` commuting with `x` and preserving `N'` preserves the preimage
873	`x⁻¹N'`. Project-local. -/
874	lemma comap_map_le_of_commute {x t : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hcomm : Commute x t)
875	    {N' : Submodule κ M} (ht' : N'.map t ≤ N') :
876	    (N'.comap x).map t ≤ N'.comap x := by
877	  rw [Submodule.map_le_iff_le_comap]
878	  intro m hm
879	  rw [Submodule.mem_comap] at hm
880	  rw [Submodule.mem_comap, Submodule.mem_comap]
881	  have key : x (t m) = t (x m) := LinearMap.congr_fun hcomm.eq m
882	  rw [key]
883	  exact ht' (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem hm)
884	
885	omit [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] in
886	/-- An endomorphism `t` commuting with `x` and preserving `N` preserves the image `x·N`.
887	Project-local. -/
888	lemma map_map_le_of_commute {x t : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hcomm : Commute x t)
889	    {N : Submodule κ M} (htN : N.map t ≤ N) :
890	    (N.map x).map t ≤ N.map x := by
891	  rw [Submodule.map_le_iff_le_comap]
892	  rintro y ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩
893	  rw [Submodule.mem_comap]
894	  have key : t (x m) = x (t m) := (LinearMap.congr_fun hcomm.eq m).symm
895	  rw [key]
896	  exact Submodule.mem_map_of_mem (htN (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem hm))

898	/-- The dimension of the preimage of `S` under the inclusion of a submodule `p` equals the
899	dimension of the ambient intersection `p ⊓ S`. Project-local helper for the degreewise
900	difference identity. -/
901	private lemma finrank_comap_subtype (p S : Submodule κ M) :
902	    Module.finrank κ ↥(Submodule.comap p.subtype S) = Module.finrank κ ↥(p ⊓ S) := by
903	  rw [← Submodule.map_comap_subtype p S]
904	  exact (Submodule.equivMapOfInjective p.subtype p.injective_subtype _).finrank_eq
905	
906	variable [∀ n, FiniteDimensional κ ↥(ℳ n)]
907	
908	/-- **D6 — subquotient degreewise difference.** For a degree-raising endomorphism `x` and
909	homogeneous submodules `N`, `N'`, the first difference of the ambient subquotient Hilbert
910	function of `(N, N')` equals the alternating sum of the Hilbert functions of the cokernel
911	subquotient `C = (N, N' ⊔ x·N)` and kernel subquotient `K = (N ⊓ x⁻¹N', N')`:
912	`hilb(n+1) − hilb(n) = hilb_C(n+1) − hilb_K(n)`. This is the `hdiff` hypothesis consumed by
913	`IsRatHilb.ofDiffEq` in the Stacks 00K1 induction. Project-local. -/
914	lemma subquotient_degreewise_diff {x : M →ₗ[κ] M} (hx : RaisesDegree ℳ x)
915	    {N N' : Submodule κ M} (hN : N.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (hN' : N'.IsHomogeneous ℳ) (n : ℕ) :
916	    subquotientHilb ℳ N N' (n + 1) - subquotientHilb ℳ N N' n
917	      = subquotientHilb ℳ N (N' ⊔ N.map x) (n + 1)
918	        - subquotientHilb ℳ (N ⊓ N'.comap x) N' n := by
919	  classical
920	  haveI : FiniteDimensional κ ↥(N ⊓ ℳ n) := Submodule.finiteDimensional_of_le inf_le_right
921	  haveI : FiniteDimensional κ ↥(N' ⊓ ℳ (n + 1)) := Submodule.finiteDimensional_of_le inf_le_right
922	  set T : Submodule κ M := (N ⊓ ℳ n).map x with hTdef
923	  have hT : N.map x ⊓ ℳ (n + 1) = T := map_inf_degree_eq ℳ hx hN n
924	  have hTle : T ≤ ℳ (n + 1) := hT ▸ inf_le_right
925	  haveI : FiniteDimensional κ ↥T := Submodule.finiteDimensional_of_le hTle
926	  -- the two linear maps into `M ⧸ N'`
927	  set φ : ↥(N ⊓ ℳ n) →ₗ[κ] (M ⧸ N') := (N'.mkQ).comp (x.comp (N ⊓ ℳ n).subtype) with hφ
928	  set g : ↥T →ₗ[κ] (M ⧸ N') := (N'.mkQ).comp T.subtype with hg
929	  have hrange : LinearMap.range φ = LinearMap.range g := by
930	    rw [hφ, hg, LinearMap.range_comp, LinearMap.range_comp, LinearMap.range_comp,
931	      Submodule.range_subtype, Submodule.range_subtype, hTdef]
932	  have hkerφ : Module.finrank κ ↥(LinearMap.ker φ)
933	      = Module.finrank κ ↥((N ⊓ N'.comap x) ⊓ ℳ n) := by
934	    have hk : LinearMap.ker φ = Submodule.comap (N ⊓ ℳ n).subtype (N'.comap x) := by
935	      rw [hφ, LinearMap.ker_comp, Submodule.ker_mkQ, Submodule.comap_comp]
936	    have heq : (N ⊓ ℳ n) ⊓ N'.comap x = (N ⊓ N'.comap x) ⊓ ℳ n := inf_right_comm _ _ _
937	    rw [hk, finrank_comap_subtype, heq]
938	  have hkerg : Module.finrank κ ↥(LinearMap.ker g) = Module.finrank κ ↥(T ⊓ N') := by
939	    rw [hg, LinearMap.ker_comp, Submodule.ker_mkQ, finrank_comap_subtype]
940	  -- inclusion–exclusion linking the cokernel block to `b` and `T`
941	  have hC : (N' ⊔ N.map x) ⊓ ℳ (n + 1) = (N' ⊓ ℳ (n + 1)) ⊔ T := by
942	    rw [sup_inf_degree_eq ℳ hN' (map_isHomogeneous ℳ hx hN), hT]
943	  have hinf : (N' ⊓ ℳ (n + 1)) ⊓ T = T ⊓ N' := by
944	    rw [inf_right_comm, inf_of_le_left (le_trans inf_le_right hTle), inf_comm]
945	  have hIE := Submodule.finrank_sup_add_finrank_inf_eq (N' ⊓ ℳ (n + 1)) T
946	  rw [← hC, hinf] at hIE
947	  -- the two rank–nullity identities
948	  have RN := LinearMap.finrank_range_add_finrank_ker φ
949	  have RG := LinearMap.finrank_range_add_finrank_ker g
950	  rw [hkerφ] at RN
951	  rw [hkerg, ← hrange] at RG
952	  -- the integer dimension identity
953	  have key : Module.finrank κ ↥((N' ⊔ N.map x) ⊓ ℳ (n + 1))
954	              + Module.finrank κ ↥((N ⊓ N'.comap x) ⊓ ℳ n)
955	           = Module.finrank κ ↥(N ⊓ ℳ n)
956	              + Module.finrank κ ↥(N' ⊓ ℳ (n + 1)) := by
957	    omega

/-! ### The last-variable surjection of polynomial rings

The finiteness transfer of the ambient subquotient induction factors the action of
`MvPolynomial (Fin (r+1)) κ` on a subquotient annihilated by the last endomorphism through the
free polynomial ring on one fewer variable, `MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ`, via the surjection
`X (Fin.last r) ↦ 0`, `X (Fin.castSucc i) ↦ X i`. -/

section LastVar

variable {κ : Type*} [Field κ]

/-- The `κ`-algebra surjection `MvPolynomial (Fin (r+1)) κ ↠ MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ` sending the
last variable `X (Fin.last r)` to `0` and `X (Fin.castSucc i)` to `X i`. Project-local: the ring
surjection along which the finiteness transfer factors
(`lem:fg_restrictScalars_of_surjective_mathlib`). -/
noncomputable def lastVarAlgHom (r : ℕ) (κ : Type*) [Field κ] :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (r + 1)) κ →ₐ[κ] MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ :=
  MvPolynomial.aeval (Fin.lastCases 0 (fun i => MvPolynomial.X i))

@[simp] lemma lastVarAlgHom_X_castSucc (r : ℕ) (i : Fin r) :
    lastVarAlgHom r κ (MvPolynomial.X (Fin.castSucc i)) = MvPolynomial.X i := by
  simp [lastVarAlgHom]

@[simp] lemma lastVarAlgHom_X_last (r : ℕ) :
    lastVarAlgHom r κ (MvPolynomial.X (Fin.last r)) = 0 := by
  simp [lastVarAlgHom]

@[simp] lemma lastVarAlgHom_C (r : ℕ) (c : κ) :
    lastVarAlgHom r κ (MvPolynomial.C c) = MvPolynomial.C c := by
  simp [lastVarAlgHom]

/-- `lastVarAlgHom` is a left inverse of `rename Fin.castSucc`, hence surjective. -/
lemma lastVarAlgHom_rename_castSucc (r : ℕ) (q : MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ) :
    lastVarAlgHom r κ (MvPolynomial.rename Fin.castSucc q) = q := by
  induction q using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a => simp
  | add p q hp hq => simp [hp, hq]
  | mul_X p i hp => simp [hp]

lemma lastVarAlgHom_surjective (r : ℕ) : Function.Surjective (lastVarAlgHom r κ) :=
  fun q => ⟨MvPolynomial.rename Fin.castSucc q, lastVarAlgHom_rename_castSucc r q⟩

instance lastVarAlgHom_ringHomSurjective (r : ℕ) :
    RingHomSurjective (lastVarAlgHom r κ).toRingHom :=
  ⟨lastVarAlgHom_surjective r⟩

end LastVar

/-! ### Finiteness transfer down one variable

The keystone of the ambient subquotient induction: if a subquotient is finite over the free
polynomial ring `MvPolynomial (Fin (r+1)) κ` and the last endomorphism annihilates it, then it is
finite over `MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ`. The action factors through the `lastVarAlgHom` surjection. -/

section Transfer

variable {κ M : Type*} [Field κ] [AddCommGroup M] [Module κ M]

/-- A `t`-stable submodule `P'` is closed under the action of any polynomial via `polyEndHom`. -/
lemma polyEndHom_mem_of_stable {r : ℕ} (t : Fin r → Module.End κ M)
    (hcomm : ∀ i j, Commute (t i) (t j)) {P' : Submodule κ M}
    (hP' : ∀ i, P'.map (t i) ≤ P') (p : MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ) :
    ∀ m ∈ P', (polyEndHom t hcomm p) m ∈ P' := by
  induction p using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a => intro m hm; rw [polyEndHom_C]; simpa using P'.smul_mem a hm
  | add p q hp hq =>
      intro m hm; rw [map_add, LinearMap.add_apply]; exact P'.add_mem (hp m hm) (hq m hm)
  | mul_X p i hp =>
      intro m hm; rw [map_mul, polyEndHom_X, Module.End.mul_apply]
      exact hp _ (hP' i (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem hm))

/-- **Mod-`P'` semilinearity heart.** For `m ∈ P`, evaluating a polynomial `s` via the full
endomorphism family `t` agrees, modulo `P'`, with first projecting away the last variable
(`lastVarAlgHom`) and evaluating via `t ∘ Fin.castSucc` — provided the last endomorphism
`x = t (Fin.last r)` carries `P` into `P'` and `P, P'` are stable under every `t i`. This is the
algebraic content of the finiteness transfer (`lem:graded_subquotient_finite_transfer`). -/
lemma polyEndHom_lastVar_sub_mem {r : ℕ} (t : Fin (r + 1) → Module.End κ M)
    (hcomm : ∀ i j, Commute (t i) (t j)) {P P' : Submodule κ M}
    (hP : ∀ i, P.map (t i) ≤ P) (hP' : ∀ i, P'.map (t i) ≤ P')
    (hannih : P.map (t (Fin.last r)) ≤ P')
    (s : MvPolynomial (Fin (r + 1)) κ) :
    ∀ m ∈ P, (polyEndHom t hcomm s) m
      - (polyEndHom (fun i => t (Fin.castSucc i)) (fun i j => hcomm _ _)
          (lastVarAlgHom r κ s)) m ∈ P' := by
  induction s using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a =>
      intro m _
      rw [lastVarAlgHom_C, polyEndHom_C, polyEndHom_C, sub_self]
      exact P'.zero_mem
  | add p q hp hq =>
      intro m hm
      rw [map_add, map_add, map_add, LinearMap.add_apply, LinearMap.add_apply]
      have := P'.add_mem (hp m hm) (hq m hm)
      convert this using 1
      abel
  | mul_X p j hp =>
      intro m hm
      rw [map_mul, polyEndHom_X, Module.End.mul_apply]
      rcases Fin.eq_castSucc_or_eq_last j with ⟨i, rfl⟩ | rfl
      · -- `j = castSucc i`: reduce to the IH at `t (castSucc i) m ∈ P`
        rw [map_mul, lastVarAlgHom_X_castSucc, map_mul, polyEndHom_X, Module.End.mul_apply]

        rw [map_mul, lastVarAlgHom_X_last, mul_zero, map_zero, LinearMap.zero_apply, sub_zero]
        exact polyEndHom_mem_of_stable t hcomm hP' p _
          (hannih (Submodule.mem_map_of_mem hm))

end Transfer

1264	/-! ### The ambient subquotient datum
1265	
1266	Bundles a homogeneous pair `N' ≤ N` of a fixed graded `κ`-module `M = ⨁ ℳ n` with `r`
1267	pairwise-commuting degree-raising endomorphisms preserving the pair, plus the finiteness of
1268	the represented subquotient `N/N'` over the free polynomial ring `MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ` (via
1269	`polySubmodule`, so the underlying carriers stay ambient submodules of `M`). This is the
1270	length-`r` carrier of the Stacks 00K1 ambient induction (`def:graded_subquotientHilb`). -/
1271	
1272	section Datum
1273	
1274	variable {κ M : Type*} [Field κ] [AddCommGroup M] [Module κ M]
1275	variable (ℳ : ℕ → Submodule κ M) [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ]
1276	
1277	/-- A length-`r` **ambient subquotient datum** over the fixed graded module `M = ⨁ ℳ n`.
1278	Project-local: the carrier of the Stacks 00K1 ambient induction (`def:graded_subquotientHilb`).
1279	The finiteness field `hfin` records that the represented subquotient `N/N'` is a finite module
1280	over the free polynomial ring `MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ` acting through the `t i`; the carriers
1281	involved are the ambient `t`-stable submodules `polySubmodule … N`, `polySubmodule … N'`. -/
1282	structure SubquotientDatum (r : ℕ) where
1283	  /-- The upper homogeneous submodule. -/
1284	  N : Submodule κ M
1285	  /-- The lower homogeneous submodule. -/
1286	  N' : Submodule κ M
1287	  /-- `N'` is contained in `N`. -/
1288	  hle : N' ≤ N
1289	  /-- `N` is homogeneous. -/
1290	  hN : N.IsHomogeneous ℳ
1291	  /-- `N'` is homogeneous. -/
1292	  hN' : N'.IsHomogeneous ℳ
1293	  /-- The `r` degree-raising endomorphisms. -/
1294	  t : Fin r → Module.End κ M
1295	  /-- They pairwise commute. -/
1296	  hcomm : ∀ i j, Commute (t i) (t j)
1297	  /-- Each raises degree by one. -/
1298	  hraise : ∀ i, RaisesDegree ℳ (t i)
1299	  /-- Each preserves `N`. -/
1300	  hpresN : ∀ i, N.map (t i) ≤ N
1301	  /-- Each preserves `N'`. -/
1302	  hpresN' : ∀ i, N'.map (t i) ≤ N'
1303	  /-- The represented subquotient `N/N'` is finite over `MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ`. -/
1304	  hfin : letI := polyModule t hcomm
1305	    Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
1306	      (↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N hpresN) ⧸
1307	        (polySubmodule t hcomm N' hpresN').comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N hpresN).subtype)
1308	
1309	/-- The ambient Hilbert function `n ↦ dim_κ(N ⊓ ℳ n) − dim_κ(N' ⊓ ℳ n)` of a subquotient
1310	datum (`def:graded_subquotientHilb`). -/
1311	noncomputable def SubquotientDatum.hilb {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ r) : ℕ → ℚ :=
1312	  subquotientHilb ℳ D.N D.N'
1313	
1314	/-- Base-case finiteness: a module finite over `MvPolynomial σ κ` for an *empty* index `σ` —
1315	in particular `σ = Fin 0`, the length-zero subquotient datum — is finite-dimensional over `κ`,
1316	since `MvPolynomial σ κ ≃ₐ[κ] κ`. Project-local: the base case of the Stacks 00K1 induction.
1317	Stated outside the `Datum` section as it needs no grading. -/
1318	lemma finiteDimensional_of_mvPolynomial_isEmpty_finite
1319	    {κ : Type*} [Field κ] {σ : Type*} [IsEmpty σ]
1320	    {Q : Type*} [AddCommGroup Q] [Module κ Q]
1321	    [Module (MvPolynomial σ κ) Q] [IsScalarTower κ (MvPolynomial σ κ) Q]
1322	    [Module.Finite (MvPolynomial σ κ) Q] : FiniteDimensional κ Q := by
1323	  haveI : Module.Finite κ (MvPolynomial σ κ) :=
1324	    Module.Finite.equiv (MvPolynomial.isEmptyAlgEquiv κ σ).symm.toLinearEquiv
1325	  exact Module.Finite.trans (MvPolynomial σ κ) Q
1326	
1327	end Datum

    (hN : ∀ i, N.map (t i) ≤ N) (hP₁ : ∀ i, P₁.map (t i) ≤ P₁) (hP₂ : ∀ i, P₂.map (t i) ≤ P₂)

    (hfin : letI := polyModule t hcomm
      Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
        (↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N hN) ⧸
          (polySubmodule t hcomm P₁ hP₁).comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N hN).subtype)) :
    letI := polyModule t hcomm
    Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
      (↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N hN) ⧸
        (polySubmodule t hcomm P₂ hP₂).comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N hN).subtype) := by
  letI := polyModule t hcomm
  haveI := hfin
  refine Module.Finite.of_surjective
    (Submodule.liftQ _
      ((polySubmodule t hcomm P₂ hP₂).comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N hN).subtype).mkQ ?_) ?_
  · rw [Submodule.ker_mkQ]
    exact Submodule.comap_mono (fun x hx => h12 hx)
  · intro z
    obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.mk_surjective _ z
    exact ⟨Submodule.Quotient.mk y, rfl⟩

/-- Shrinking the numerator keeps `S`-finiteness: `N₁/P'` embeds as an `S`-submodule of `N₂/P'`
when `N₁ ≤ N₂`, and a submodule of a Noetherian (finite over a Noetherian ring) module is
finite. -/
lemma polyQuot_finite_of_le_numerator {r : ℕ} (t : Fin r → Module.End κ M)
    (hcomm : ∀ i j, Commute (t i) (t j)) {N₁ N₂ P' : Submodule κ M}
    (hN₁ : ∀ i, N₁.map (t i) ≤ N₁) (hN₂ : ∀ i, N₂.map (t i) ≤ N₂) (hP' : ∀ i, P'.map (t i) ≤ P')
    (h12 : N₁ ≤ N₂)
    (hfin : letI := polyModule t hcomm
      Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
        (↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N₂ hN₂) ⧸
          (polySubmodule t hcomm P' hP').comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N₂ hN₂).subtype)) :
    letI := polyModule t hcomm
    Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
      (↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N₁ hN₁) ⧸
        (polySubmodule t hcomm P' hP').comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N₁ hN₁).subtype) := by
  letI := polyModule t hcomm
  haveI : IsNoetherianRing (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ) := MvPolynomial.isNoetherianRing_fin
  haveI := hfin
  haveI : IsNoetherian (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
      (↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N₂ hN₂) ⧸
        (polySubmodule t hcomm P' hP').comap (polySubmodule t hcomm N₂ hN₂).subtype) :=
    isNoetherian_of_isNoetherianRing_of_finite _ _
  -- the inclusion of numerators descends to an injective `S`-linear map of quotients
  set incl : ↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N₁ hN₁) →ₗ[MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ]
      ↥(polySubmodule t hcomm N₂ hN₂) :=
    Submodule.inclusion (fun x hx => h12 hx) with hincl
  refine Module.Finite.of_injective
    (Submodule.mapQ _ _ incl ?_) ?_
  · intro y hy
    rw [Submodule.mem_comap] at hy ⊢
    exact hy
  · rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot, eq_bot_iff]
    intro z hz
    induction z using Submodule.Quotient.induction_on with
    | _ y =>
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker, Submodule.mapQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero,
        Submodule.mem_comap] at hz
      rw [Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero, Submodule.mem_comap]
      exact hz

end Transfer

noncomputable def SubquotientDatum.hilb {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ r) : ℕ → ℚ :=
  subquotientHilb ℳ D.N D.N'

/-- The kernel pair's lower module `N ⊓ x⁻¹N'` is stable under every endomorphism of the family
(needed for the finiteness transfer over the full polynomial ring). -/
lemma ker_stable_full {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ (r + 1)) (i : Fin (r + 1)) :
    (D.N ⊓ (D.N').comap (D.t (Fin.last r))).map (D.t i)
      ≤ D.N ⊓ (D.N').comap (D.t (Fin.last r)) :=
  le_trans (le_inf (Submodule.map_mono inf_le_left) (Submodule.map_mono inf_le_right))
    (inf_le_inf (D.hpresN i) (comap_map_le_of_commute (D.hcomm (Fin.last r) i) (D.hpresN' i)))

/-- The cokernel pair's upper module `N' ⊔ x·N` is stable under every endomorphism of the family. -/
lemma coker_stable_full {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ (r + 1)) (i : Fin (r + 1)) :
    (D.N' ⊔ D.N.map (D.t (Fin.last r))).map (D.t i)
      ≤ D.N' ⊔ D.N.map (D.t (Fin.last r)) := by
  rw [Submodule.map_sup]
  exact sup_le_sup (D.hpresN' i)
    (map_map_le_of_commute (D.hcomm (Fin.last r) i) (D.hpresN i))

/-- **Kernel constructor.** From a length-`(r+1)` subquotient datum, the kernel subquotient
`(N ⊓ x⁻¹N', N')` of multiplication by `x = t (last)`, as a length-`r` datum on `t ∘ castSucc`.
All non-finiteness fields are the ambient kernel/cokernel calculus; the finiteness field is the
keystone transfer `subquotient_finite_transfer_core` (`lem:graded_subquotient_finite_transfer`). -/
noncomputable def SubquotientDatum.ker {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ (r + 1)) :
    SubquotientDatum ℳ r where
  N := D.N ⊓ (D.N').comap (D.t (Fin.last r))
  N' := D.N'
  hle := ker_le D.hle (D.hpresN' (Fin.last r))
  hN := ker_isHomogeneous ℳ (D.hraise (Fin.last r)) D.hN D.hN'
  hN' := D.hN'
  t := fun i => D.t (Fin.castSucc i)
  hcomm := fun i j => D.hcomm _ _
  hraise := fun i => D.hraise _
  hpresN := fun i => ker_stable_full ℳ D (Fin.castSucc i)
  hpresN' := fun i => D.hpresN' _
  hfin :=
    subquotient_finite_transfer_core D.t D.hcomm (ker_stable_full ℳ D) D.hpresN'
      ker_annihilate
      (polyQuot_finite_of_le_numerator D.t D.hcomm (ker_stable_full ℳ D) D.hpresN D.hpresN'
        inf_le_left D.hfin)

/-- **Cokernel constructor.** From a length-`(r+1)` subquotient datum, the cokernel subquotient
`(N, N' ⊔ x·N)` of multiplication by `x = t (last)`, as a length-`r` datum on `t ∘ castSucc`. -/
noncomputable def SubquotientDatum.coker {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ (r + 1)) :
    SubquotientDatum ℳ r where
  N := D.N
  N' := D.N' ⊔ D.N.map (D.t (Fin.last r))
  hle := coker_le D.hle (D.hpresN (Fin.last r))
  hN := D.hN
  hN' := coker_isHomogeneous ℳ (D.hraise (Fin.last r)) D.hN D.hN'
  t := fun i => D.t (Fin.castSucc i)
  hcomm := fun i j => D.hcomm _ _
  hraise := fun i => D.hraise _
  hpresN := fun i => D.hpresN _
  hpresN' := fun i => coker_stable_full ℳ D (Fin.castSucc i)
  hfin :=
    subquotient_finite_transfer_core D.t D.hcomm D.hpresN (coker_stable_full ℳ D)
      coker_annihilate
      (polyQuot_finite_of_le_denominator D.t D.hcomm D.hpresN D.hpresN' (coker_stable_full ℳ D)
        le_sup_left D.hfin)

section Induction

variable [∀ n, FiniteDimensional κ ↥(ℳ n)]

/-- **Base case of the ambient subquotient induction.** A length-`0` subquotient datum has an
eventually-zero ambient Hilbert function: the subquotient `N/N'` is finite over
`MvPolynomial (Fin 0) κ ≃ κ`, hence finite-dimensional over `κ`, so its degreewise pieces — an
independent family inside the finite-dimensional quotient — vanish for large degree. -/
lemma subquotient_base_eventuallyZero (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ 0) :
    ∃ K, ∀ n, K < n → D.hilb n = 0 := by
  -- the subquotient is finite-dimensional over `κ`
  letI := polyModule D.t D.hcomm
  haveI : IsScalarTower κ (MvPolynomial (Fin 0) κ) M := polyModule_isScalarTower D.t D.hcomm
  haveI hfd : FiniteDimensional κ (↥(polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN) ⧸
      (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N' D.hpresN').comap
        (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN).subtype) := by
    haveI := D.hfin
    exact finiteDimensional_of_mvPolynomial_isEmpty_finite
  -- abbreviate the quotient and the degreewise images
  set Q := ↥(polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN) ⧸
    (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N' D.hpresN').comap
      (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN).subtype with hQ
  set K' : Submodule κ (↥(polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN)) :=
    (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N' D.hpresN').comap
      (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN).subtype with hK'
  -- `ψ n` maps the degree-`n` ambient piece `N ⊓ ℳ n` into the quotient `Q`
  set ψ : ∀ n, ↥(D.N ⊓ ℳ n) →ₗ[κ] Q := fun n =>
    K'.mkQ ∘ₗ Submodule.inclusion
      (show D.N ⊓ ℳ n ≤ polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN from inf_le_left) with hψ
  -- the ranges form an independent family in the finite-dimensional `Q`
  have hindep : iSupIndep (fun n => LinearMap.range (ψ n)) := by
    sorry
  haveI : _root_.IsNoetherian κ Q := isNoetherian_of_isNoetherianRing_of_finite κ Q
  have hfin := Submodule.finite_ne_bot_of_iSupIndep hindep
  -- a finite set of naturals is bounded: pick `K` above it
  obtain ⟨K, hK⟩ := (hfin.bddAbove)
  refine ⟨K, fun n hn => ?_⟩
  -- beyond `K`, `range (ψ n) = ⊥`, forcing `N ⊓ ℳ n ≤ N'`, hence the Hilbert value is `0`
  have hbot : LinearMap.range (ψ n) = ⊥ := by
    by_contra h
    exact absurd (hK h) (not_le.mpr hn)
  have hsub : D.N ⊓ ℳ n ≤ D.N' := by
    intro m hm
    have : ψ n ⟨m, hm⟩ = 0 := by
      rw [← LinearMap.mem_range] at *
      exact hbot ▸ (LinearMap.mem_range_self (ψ n) ⟨m, hm⟩)
    rw [hψ] at this
    simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at this
    rw [hK', Submodule.mem_comap] at this
    exact this
  -- `N ⊓ ℳ n = N' ⊓ ℳ n`, so the finrank difference vanishes
  have heq : D.N ⊓ ℳ n = D.N' ⊓ ℳ n :=
    le_antisymm (le_inf (le_trans inf_le_left (le_trans (le_refl _) (by
      intro x hx; exact hsub hx))) inf_le_right) (inf_le_inf D.hle (le_refl _))
  simp only [SubquotientDatum.hilb, subquotientHilb, heq, sub_self]

/-- **The ambient subquotient induction (Stacks 00K1).** The ambient Hilbert function of a
length-`r` subquotient datum is a rational Hilbert function of order `r`
(`lem:graded_subquotient_isRatHilb`). Induction on `r`: the base case is the eventually-zero
function; the step feeds the kernel/cokernel data (`SubquotientDatum.ker`, `.coker`) and the
degreewise difference identity into `IsRatHilb.ofDiffEq`. -/
lemma subquotient_hilbertSeries_rational :
    ∀ {r : ℕ} (D : SubquotientDatum ℳ r), IsRatHilb (D.hilb) r := by
  intro r
  induction r with
  | zero =>
      intro D
      obtain ⟨K, hK⟩ := subquotient_base_eventuallyZero ℳ D
      exact IsRatHilb.ofEventuallyZero K hK
  | succ r ih =>
      intro D
      have hx : RaisesDegree ℳ (D.t (Fin.last r)) := D.hraise _
      refine IsRatHilb.ofDiffEq (N := 0) (ih (D.coker)) (ih (D.ker)) ?_
      intro n _
      exact subquotient_degreewise_diff ℳ hx D.hN D.hN' n

end Induction

end Datum

/-- **Graded Hilbert–Serre: rationality of the Hilbert series** (`lem:gradedHilbertSerre_rational`).
For a graded `κ`-module `M = ⨁ ℳ n` with finite-dimensional components, equipped with `r`
pairwise-commuting degree-one endomorphisms (the degree-one generators of the action) for which `M`
is finite over the free polynomial ring `MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ`, the Hilbert function
`n ↦ dim_κ ℳ n` is a rational Hilbert function of order `r`: there are `p ∈ ℚ[X]` and `N` with
`dim_κ ℳ n = [Xⁿ](p · (1 - X)⁻ʳ)` for all `n > N`. This is the substantive (non-Mathlib) half of
graded Hilbert–Serre; it is obtained from the ambient subquotient induction
(`GradedModule.subquotient_hilbertSeries_rational`) applied to the top datum `(⊤, ⊥)`. -/
lemma gradedModule_hilbertSeries_rational {κ M : Type*} [Field κ] [AddCommGroup M] [Module κ M]
    (ℳ : ℕ → Submodule κ M) [DirectSum.Decomposition ℳ] [∀ n, FiniteDimensional κ ↥(ℳ n)]
    {r : ℕ} (t : Fin r → Module.End κ M) (hcomm : ∀ i j, Commute (t i) (t j))
    (hraise : ∀ i, GradedModule.RaisesDegree ℳ (t i))
    (hfin : letI := GradedModule.polyModule t hcomm
      Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ) M) :
    IsRatHilb (fun n => (Module.finrank κ ↥(ℳ n) : ℚ)) r := by
  letI := GradedModule.polyModule t hcomm
  haveI := hfin
  -- the top datum `(⊤, ⊥)`: its finiteness is exactly `M` finite over the polynomial ring
  have hfintop : Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ)
      (↥(GradedModule.polySubmodule t hcomm ⊤ (fun _ => le_top)) ⧸
        (GradedModule.polySubmodule t hcomm ⊥ (fun _ => by rw [Submodule.map_bot])).comap
          (GradedModule.polySubmodule t hcomm ⊤ (fun _ => le_top)).subtype) := by
    refine Module.Finite.of_surjective
      ({ toFun := fun m => Submodule.Quotient.mk ⟨m, Submodule.mem_top⟩
         map_add' := fun a b => by rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_add]; rfl
         map_smul' := fun c a => by rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul]; rfl } :
        M →ₗ[MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ] _) ?_
    intro z
    refine Submodule.Quotient.induction_on _ z (fun y => ⟨(y : M), rfl⟩)
  set D : GradedModule.SubquotientDatum ℳ r :=
    { N := ⊤
      N' := ⊥
      hle := bot_le
      hN := Submodule.IsHomogeneous.top ℳ
      hN' := Submodule.IsHomogeneous.bot ℳ
      t := t
      hcomm := hcomm
      hraise := hraise
      hpresN := fun _ => le_top
      hpresN' := fun _ => by rw [Submodule.map_bot]
      hfin := hfintop } with hD
  have hrat := GradedModule.subquotient_hilbertSeries_rational ℳ D
  have heq : GradedModule.SubquotientDatum.hilb ℳ D
      = fun n => (Module.finrank κ ↥(ℳ n) : ℚ) := by
    funext n
    simp only [hD, GradedModule.SubquotientDatum.hilb, GradedModule.subquotientHilb,
      top_inf_eq, bot_inf_eq, finrank_bot, Nat.cast_zero, sub_zero, Int.cast_natCast]
  rwa [heq] at hrat

    ∃ K, ∀ n, K < n → subquotientHilb ℳ D.N D.N' n = 0 := by
  classical
  letI := polyModule D.t D.hcomm
  haveI hts : IsScalarTower κ (MvPolynomial (Fin 0) κ) M := polyModule_isScalarTower D.t D.hcomm
  haveI := D.hfin
  -- the subquotient `Q = N/N'` is finite-dimensional over `κ`

      (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N' D.hpresN').comap

    finiteDimensional_of_mvPolynomial_isEmpty_finite (σ := Fin 0)
  set W : Submodule (MvPolynomial (Fin 0) κ) ↥(polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN) :=
    (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N' D.hpresN').comap
      (polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN).subtype with hW
  set Q := ↥(polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN) ⧸ W with hQ
  -- the degreewise image map `ψ n : N ⊓ ℳ n →ₗ[κ] Q`, `m ↦ [m]`
  set ψ : ∀ n, ↥(D.N ⊓ ℳ n) →ₗ[κ] Q := fun n =>
    { toFun := fun m => Submodule.Quotient.mk ⟨(m : M), inf_le_left m.2⟩
      map_add' := fun a b => by rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_add]; rfl
      map_smul' := fun c a => by
        simp only [RingHom.id_apply, SetLike.val_smul]
        rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul]

  -- the ranges form an independent family in the finite-dimensional `Q`
  have hindep : iSupIndep (fun n => LinearMap.range (ψ n)) := by
    sorry

    rw [hW, Submodule.mem_comap] at h1
    exact h1

    le_antisymm (le_inf hsub inf_le_right) (inf_le_inf D.hle le_rfl)

628	
629	/-- **G1(a) — independence of the graded pieces of a homogeneous submodule.** The graded
630	pieces `ℳ i ⊓ p` of any submodule `p` are independent, since they refine the independent
631	grading family `ℳ` of the ambient module. Project-local: half of the induced internal
632	direct sum decomposition of a homogeneous submodule. -/
633	theorem homogeneousSubmodule_inf_iSupIndep (p : Submodule R M) :
634	    iSupIndep fun i => ℳ i ⊓ p :=
635	  ((DirectSum.Decomposition.isInternal ℳ).submodule_iSupIndep).mono fun _ => inf_le_left
636	
637	/-- **G1(b) — a homogeneous submodule is the supremum of its graded pieces.** For an
638	internally graded module `M = ⨁ ℳ i` and a homogeneous submodule `p`
639	(`Submodule.IsHomogeneous`), `p = ⨆ i, (ℳ i ⊓ p)`. Combined with
640	`homogeneousSubmodule_inf_iSupIndep` this exhibits the induced internal direct sum grading
641	`p = ⨁ i, (ℳ i ⊓ p)` that Mathlib's `HomogeneousSubmodule` scaffold does not supply; it
642	gives the graded kernel `K = ker(x : M → M(1))` its grading
643	`K_n = ker(x : M_n → M_{n+1})`.
644

646	`DirectSum.IsInternal` on the subtype `↥p`: the latter triggers a runaway `isDefEq`

  -- `D.hN'`) gives `m ∈ N'`, i.e. `[m] = 0`. The remaining work is the `Submodule.mem_iSup`

-- the ranges form an independent family in the finite-dimensional `Q`: the degree-`n`
  -- projection descends to a detector `Φ : Q →ₗ[κ] M ⧸ N'` that kills `range (ψ j)` for `j ≠ n`
  -- and is injective on `range (ψ n)` (using homogeneity of `N'`, `D.hN'`).
  have hindep : iSupIndep (fun n => LinearMap.range (ψ n)) := by
    intro n
    -- degree-`n` projection on `M`
    set πn : M →ₗ[κ] M :=
      (ℳ n).subtype ∘ₗ DFinsupp.lapply n ∘ₗ (DirectSum.decomposeLinearEquiv ℳ).toLinearMap
      with hπndef
    have hπn : ∀ m : M, πn m = (DirectSum.decompose ℳ m n : M) := by
      intro m
      simp [hπndef, DirectSum.decomposeLinearEquiv_apply, DFinsupp.lapply_apply]
    -- the detector map `g` on the numerator, then its descent `Φ` to `Q`
    have hg : W ≤ LinearMap.ker
        ((D.N'.mkQ ∘ₗ πn).comp
          ((polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN).subtype.restrictScalars κ)) := by
      intro y hy
      rw [hW, Submodule.mem_comap] at hy
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker]
      simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.restrictScalars_apply, hπn,
        Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
      exact (Submodule.IsHomogeneous.mem_iff ℳ D.hN').mp hy n
    set Φ : Q →ₗ[κ] (M ⧸ D.N') :=
      Submodule.liftQ W ((D.N'.mkQ ∘ₗ πn).comp
        ((polySubmodule D.t D.hcomm D.N D.hpresN).subtype.restrictScalars κ)) hg with hΦdef
    -- `Φ` kills `range (ψ j)` for `j ≠ n`
    have hker : (⨆ (j) (_ : j ≠ n), LinearMap.range (ψ j)) ≤ LinearMap.ker Φ := by
      refine iSup₂_le (fun j hj => ?_)
      intro z hz
      obtain ⟨b, rfl⟩ := hz
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker, hψ]
      simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
      rw [hΦdef, Submodule.liftQ_apply]
      simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.restrictScalars_apply, hπn,
        Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
      rw [DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_ne ℳ (Submodule.mem_inf.mp b.2).2 hj]
      exact Submodule.zero_mem _
    -- `Φ` is injective on `range (ψ n)`
    have hdisj : Disjoint (LinearMap.range (ψ n)) (LinearMap.ker Φ) := by
      rw [Submodule.disjoint_def]
      rintro z hz hzk
      obtain ⟨a, rfl⟩ := hz
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker, hΦdef, hψ] at hzk
      simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk] at hzk ⊢
      rw [Submodule.liftQ_apply] at hzk
      simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.restrictScalars_apply, hπn,
        Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hzk
      rw [DirectSum.decompose_of_mem_same ℳ (Submodule.mem_inf.mp a.2).2] at hzk
      rw [Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero, hW, Submodule.mem_comap]
      exact hzk
    exact hdisj.mono_right hker

# AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/QuotScheme.lean

## Summary (iter-019, QUOT lane — TOP-DOWN induction body)

**Built the entire Stacks 00K1 ambient subquotient induction end-to-end and closed the
finiteness keystone.** The chain `gradedModule_hilbertSeries_rational`
(`lem:gradedHilbertSerre_rational`, the SNAP-S2 keystone) is now fully assembled with **exactly
one precisely-characterized residual `sorry`** (the base-case degreewise independence). The
genuine 3-iter QUOT blocker — the finiteness transfer down one variable — is **fully proved and
axiom-clean** (`propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound`; no `sorryAx`).

Build: `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.QuotScheme` GREEN. Sorries = 4 pre-existing protected
stubs (123/161/198/225, untouched) + 1 new residual (1459, base case).

## subquotient_finite_transfer (line ~1206) — KEYSTONE, RESOLVED (axiom-clean)
### Approach
The σ-semilinear transfer along `lastVarAlgHom : MvPolynomial (Fin (r+1)) κ ↠ MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ`
(`X (last) ↦ 0`, `X (castSucc i) ↦ X i`). The mod-`P'` semilinearity heart
`polyEndHom_lastVar_sub_mem` is proved by `MvPolynomial.induction_on` (the `X_last` case lands in
`P'` by annihilation; the `X_castSucc` case is the IH). Then `Module.Finite.of_surjective` with the
identity σ-semilinear map (built via `Submodule.liftQ` on the defeq-carrier quotients).
### Result
RESOLVED. This is the load-bearing piece flagged by the corrective ("write `subquotient_finite_transfer`").
### Key insight
The two quotient carriers `↥(polySubmodule t …) ⧸ …` and `↥(polySubmodule (t∘castSucc) …) ⧸ …`
are **defeq** (carrier = the same κ-submodule), so the transfer map is the identity on elements,
σ-semilinear by `polyEndHom_lastVar_sub_mem`.

## SubquotientDatum.ker / .coker (lines ~1396, ~1426) — RESOLVED
Full constructors `SubquotientDatum ℳ (r+1) → SubquotientDatum ℳ r`. Non-finiteness fields from
the existing ambient calculus (`ker_isHomogeneous`, `ker_le`, `comap_map_le_of_commute`, …); the
`hfin` field via `subquotient_finite_transfer` fed by `polyQuot_finite_of_le_numerator` (ker, a
Noetherian-submodule argument) / `polyQuot_finite_of_le_denominator` (coker, a quotient surjection).

## subquotient_hilbertSeries_rational (line ~1512) — RESOLVED (modulo base leaf)
The `lem:graded_subquotient_isRatHilb` induction on `r`. Step: `IsRatHilb.ofDiffEq` fed by
`ih (D.coker)`, `ih (D.ker)`, and `subquotient_degreewise_diff` (`change` to expose the
defeq `coker.hilb`/`ker.hilb` forms). Base: `subquotient_base_eventuallyZero` (the residual leaf).

## gradedModule_hilbertSeries_rational (line ~1530) — RESOLVED (modulo base leaf)
`AlgebraicGeometry.gradedModule_hilbertSeries_rational` (matches blueprint pin
`lem:gradedHilbertSerre_rational`). Builds the top datum `(⊤, ⊥)` (its `hfin` = `M` finite over
`MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ`, transferred to the `⊤/⊥` quotient via `Module.Finite.of_surjective`),
runs the induction, and rewrites `subquotientHilb ℳ ⊤ ⊥ = (n ↦ dim_κ ℳ n)` via
`top_inf_eq`/`bot_inf_eq`/`finrank_bot`. **This is the SNAP-S2 keystone.**

## subquotient_base_eventuallyZero (line 1459) — PARTIAL (1 residual sorry)
### Done
Everything except one `iSupIndep`: `FiniteDimensional κ Q₀` is obtained from `D.hfin` via
`finiteDimensional_of_mvPolynomial_isEmpty_finite`; the degreewise image maps `ψ n : N ⊓ ℳ n →ₗ[κ] Q₀`
are built (incl. `map_smul' := rfl` modulo the scalar tower); `range (ψ n) = ⊥ ⟹ subquotientHilb n = 0`
and the `bddAbove` extraction of the eventual threshold are proved. The ONLY hole is:
```
have hindep : iSupIndep (fun n => LinearMap.range (ψ n)) := by sorry
```
### Residual sorry — precise characterization
`iSupIndep` of the degreewise images in the finite-dimensional `Q₀`. Mathematics is settled: the
degree-`n` projection `πₙ : M → M` (`DirectSum.decomposeLinearEquiv`) descends to a κ-linear detector
`Φ : Q₀ →ₗ[κ] M ⧸ N'`, `[m] ↦ [πₙ m]`, killing `range (ψ j)` for `j ≠ n` (`decompose_of_mem_ne`)
and equal to the injection on `range (ψ n)` (`decompose_of_mem_same`); homogeneity of `N'` (`D.hN'`)
makes `Φ` well-defined. Then `⨆ j≠n range (ψ j) ≤ ker Φ` + `Disjoint (range (ψ n)) (ker Φ)`.
### Dead end / obstruction (for next iter)
Building the κ-linear `Φ` **out of** the `S = MvPolynomial (Fin 0) κ`-quotient `Q₀` via
`Submodule.liftQ` clashes on the scalar ring (`liftQ` produces an `S`-(semi)linear map; the target
`M ⧸ N'` is only a κ-module). Two viable fixes next iter: (a) prove `πₙ` is `S`-linear (for
`Fin 0`, `S` acts as κ-scalars) and keep `Φ : Q₀ →ₗ[S] Q₀`, comparing `(ker Φ).restrictScalars κ`;
or (b) use the dfinsupp destructuring of `⨆ j≠n` (`Submodule.mem_iSup_iff_exists_dfinsupp`) and the
degree-`n` homogeneous component directly, staying inside `Q₀`'s fixed κ-structure (no outgoing map).
Approach (b) avoids the ring clash entirely and is recommended.
### `Submodule.finite_ne_bot_of_iSupIndep` [verified] is the finishing lemma once `iSupIndep` lands.

## Needs blueprint entry
The following NEW declarations were introduced and need blueprint blocks (1-to-1 correspondence).
All are in `namespace AlgebraicGeometry.GradedModule` unless noted.

- `lastVarAlgHom` (+ `lastVarAlgHom_X_castSucc`, `_X_last`, `_C`, `_rename_castSucc`,
  `_surjective`, instance `lastVarAlgHom_ringHomSurjective`) — the surjection
  `MvPolynomial (Fin (r+1)) κ ↠ MvPolynomial (Fin r) κ` (`X last ↦ 0`). Uses: `MvPolynomial.aeval`,
  `Fin.lastCases`, `MvPolynomial.rename`. Realizes the ring surjection of
  `lem:fg_restrictScalars_of_surjective_mathlib`.
- `polyEndHom_mem_of_stable` — a `t`-stable submodule is closed under `polyEndHom p`. Uses:
  `MvPolynomial.induction_on`, `polyEndHom_C`/`_X`.
- `polyEndHom_lastVar_sub_mem` — the mod-`P'` semilinearity heart of the finiteness transfer.
  Uses: `MvPolynomial.induction_on`, `Fin.eq_castSucc_or_eq_last`, `polyEndHom_mem_of_stable`.
- `subquotient_finite_transfer` — **matches existing pin `lem:graded_subquotient_finite_transfer`**
  but the statement is the abstract single-pair σ-transfer (not the K,C-specific phrasing); the
  reviewer/planner may want to adjust the blueprint prose. Uses: `Module.Finite.of_surjective`,
  `Submodule.liftQ`, `polyEndHom_lastVar_sub_mem`, `lastVarAlgHom_surjective`.
- `polyQuot_finite_of_le_denominator`, `polyQuot_finite_of_le_numerator` — quotient/sub finiteness
  over `S`, feeding the coker/ker `hfin`. Uses: `Module.Finite.of_surjective` / `.of_injective`,
  `MvPolynomial.isNoetherianRing_fin`, `isNoetherian_of_isNoetherianRing_of_finite`.
- `ker_stable_full`, `coker_stable_full` — the kernel/cokernel pair stable under the full family
  (needed for the over-`S` finiteness inputs).
- `SubquotientDatum.ker`, `SubquotientDatum.coker` — the constructors referenced narratively by
  `lem:graded_subquotient_ker_coker`; give them their own `\lean{}` blocks (constructors, not lemmas).
- `subquotient_base_eventuallyZero` — base case of `lem:graded_subquotient_isRatHilb` (eventual
  vanishing). Uses: `finiteDimensional_of_mvPolynomial_isEmpty_finite`,
  `Submodule.finite_ne_bot_of_iSupIndep`.

## Marker readiness (for review agent / sync_leanok)
- `subquotient_finite_transfer`, `SubquotientDatum.ker`, `.coker`, `polyQuot_finite_of_le_*`,
  `lastVarAlgHom*`, `polyEndHom_*`, `ker_stable_full`, `coker_stable_full`: fully proved,
  axiom-clean → eligible for `\leanok` once blueprinted.
- `subquotient_hilbertSeries_rational`, `gradedModule_hilbertSeries_rational`,
  `subquotient_base_eventuallyZero`: statement-complete, transitively `sorryAx` via the base-case
  `iSupIndep` leaf → statement-`\leanok` only (no proof-`\leanok` until the leaf closes). The
  deterministic `sync_leanok` will handle this from the actual sorry analysis.

## Plan-pin reconfirmation
- `Module.Finite.of_surjective` [verified], `MvPolynomial.isNoetherianRing_fin` [verified],
  `isNoetherian_of_isNoetherianRing_of_finite` [verified], `Module.Finite.of_injective`
  (`[IsNoetherian]`, RingHomInvPair) [verified], `Submodule.finite_ne_bot_of_iSupIndep` [verified],
  `DirectSum.decomposeLinearEquiv` [verified].
